channel.title: Transcripts: Prof G Pod (Scott Galloway)
channel.description: YouTube video transcripts from Prof G Pod (Scott Galloway)

item.title: The Iran War Restart Is EXACTLY What Trump Wanted — And NOBODY'S Saying It
item.description:
Scott Galloway and Jessica Tarlov talk about what it means for the Iran war to be back on: Trump has formally notified Congress that fighting has resumed and the U.S. is reinstating a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. What happens next? Will Trump go through with a plan to impose a 20% fee on ships passing through the waterway, or will he back off the toll plan — as he seemed to indicate, later in the day, that he would?
Protesters surrounded Senator Susan Collins' office following the fatal ICE shooting of a 26-year-old Colombian man in Maine — a man who was not the target of the agents' arrest warrant, and whose three-year-old daughter was reportedly in the car at the time he was killed. Scott and Jessica talk about the implications of ICE’s unconstitutional tactics, and what they signal more broadly about the damage being done to the relationship between the American people and their government.
Get your tickets now for our live show at 92NY: https://www.92ny.org/event/scott-galloway-and-jessica-tarlov
The Iran War Is Back: Naval Blockade, Tolls, and a Broken Strategy Tom Homman, Private Prisons, and the Corruption Behind ICE
#trump #uspolitics #politics #scottgalloway #jessicatarlov #republicans #gop #republicanparty #democrats #democraticparty #straitofhormuz #iran #iranwar #iranceasefire #shippingtolls #globalshipping #susancollins #maine #ICE #ICEshooting #immigration #bodycameras #lawenforcement #biddeford #houston
For ad-free episodes, exclusive livestreams, and to connect with Scott, Jessica, and the Raging Moderates community, join us at ProfG+ on Substack: https://ragingmoderates.profgmedia.com/ Get The Monday Rage newsletter: https://profgmedia.com/s/monday-rage/

Subscribe to our YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@RagingModerates

item.title: Collins’ ICE vote — “$70 billion, no stipulations”
item.description: Sen. Susan Collins (R-ME) has been the subject of scrutiny after her vote for ICE funding that allowed the agency o operate with very few restrictions. Scott Galloway and Jessica Tarlov discuss, on Raging Moderates.

item.title: Todd Blanche and “the worst cover up in American history”
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche faced tough questions during his Confirmation Hearing. Jessica Tarlov and Aaron Parnas discuss, on Raging Perspective.

item.title: Raging Perspective LIVE w/ Jessica Tarlov & Aaron Parnas
item.description:
Join Jessica Tarlov and Aaron Parnas (@aaronparnas1) for Raging Perspective: the weekly politics live show, keeping you informed with all the latest news — and not holding back when it makes us rage.
To see Raging Perspective LIVE, and to get ad-free episodes of Raging Moderates and all the other Prof G shows: join ProfG+ on Substack: https://ragingmoderates.profgmedia.com/ Get The Monday Rage newsletter: https://profgmedia.com/s/monday-rage/
